subject: api.example.com SSL certificate expiring soon
description: Certificate monitoring alert: The SSL certificate for api.example.com expires on 2026-03-31, 3 days remaining. Certificate type: Single-domain OV, Issuer: DigiCert. Currently deployed on nginx-lb-01 and nginx-lb-02. This domain handles all external API traffic, approximately 5 million daily requests.

comments.author: Li (Ops Engineer)
comments.text: Contacted DigiCert to submit renewal request, expected issuance within 24 hours

subject: *.internal.com wildcard certificate expiring soon
description: Certificate monitoring alert: The wildcard SSL certificate for *.internal.com expires on 2026-04-04, 10 days remaining. Certificate type: Wildcard DV, Issuer: Let's Encrypt. Deployed on internal service gateway gateway-01. Covers subdomains including: gitlab.internal.com, jenkins.internal.com, grafana.internal.com, harbor.internal.com -- 12 internal services total.

comments.author: Zhang (Ops Admin)
comments.text: The Let's Encrypt auto-renewal script was configured previously; need to check if certbot is running properly

subject: pay.example.com SSL certificate has expired
description: URGENT ALERT: The SSL certificate for pay.example.com expired on 2026-03-27! Certificate type: Single-domain EV, Issuer: GlobalSign. This domain handles the payment callback service; the expired certificate prevents third-party payment platforms from making callbacks, affecting all online payment orders. Customers are already reporting payment failures. Deployed on nginx-pay-01.

comments.author: Wang (Ops Engineer)
comments.text: EV certificate renewal requires enterprise verification which takes time. Contacting GlobalSign for the express lane.
